common.updateAvailable: Update available - reload the page to get the latest version.
common.errorOffline: No internet connection. Please check your network.
common.errorForbidden: Access denied. Please sign in again.
common.errorServer: Server error. Please try again later.
common.errorTimeout: The connection took too long. Please try again.

dashboard.loadError: Dashboard could not be fully loaded.

tasks.emptyDescription: Create new tasks with the + button.
tasks.reminderNeedsDueDate: Set a due date to enable task reminders.

shopping.noListsDescription: Create a list with the + button.
shopping.emptyListDescription: Add items using the input field above.

meals.title: Meal Plan
meals.loadError: Meal plan could not be loaded.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.noEvents: No events in the selected period.
calendar.invalidDate: Use a valid date in the selected date format.
calendar.caldavTargetHint: Choose a CalDAV calendar to sync this event.
calendar.attachmentHint: Attach a local image, PDF, or document. Images will be shown in the event popup.
calendar.attachmentReadError: The attachment could not be read.
calendar.attachmentTooLarge: Attachment may be at most 5 MB.

notes.title: Board
notes.emptyDescription: Create a new note with the + button.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or email…
contacts.emptyDescription: Add new contacts with the + button.
contacts.vcardNoName: vCard does not contain a name.

budget.title: Budget
budget.emptyDescription: Add budget entries with the + button.
budget.metaLoadError: Budget categories could not be loaded.
budget.deleteLoanConfirm: Delete loan "{{title}}"? Payments already posted to the budget will also be removed.
budget.loansEmptyDescription: Create a loan from the + button and choose Loan.

settings.title: Settings
settings.modulesHint: Disabled modules disappear from the navigation. Data is preserved and reappears once a module is re-enabled.
settings.shoppingCategoriesHint: Add, rename, delete or reorder categories.
settings.shoppingCategoryDeleteConfirm: Delete category "{{name}}"? Existing items will be moved to the next category.
settings.appNameHint: This name appears in the sidebar, browser title and login screen.
settings.dateFormatHint: Choose how dates are displayed throughout the app.
settings.googleOnlyAdmin: Only admin can connect Google Calendar.
settings.appleOnlyAdmin: Only admin can connect Apple Calendar.
settings.syncSuccessGoogle: Calendar sync with Google connected successfully.
settings.syncSuccessApple: Calendar sync with Apple connected successfully.
settings.syncErrorGoogle: Connection to Google failed. Please try again.
settings.syncErrorApple: Connection to Apple failed. Please try again.
settings.profilePictureHint: PNG, JPEG or WebP. Large images are resized before upload.
settings.profilePictureTypeError: Use a PNG, JPEG or WebP image.
settings.profilePictureTooLarge: Profile picture is still too large after resizing.
settings.profilePictureReadError: Could not read the selected image.
settings.systemAdminHint: System admins can manage application settings, integrations, API tokens and family accounts.
settings.mealTypesHint: Only selected meal types are shown in the meal planner.
settings.mealTypesMinOne: At least one meal type must be active.
settings.currencyHint: Sets the currency used throughout the budget section.
settings.apiTokensHint: Create API tokens for external integrations. The full token is shown only once after creation.
settings.apiTokenExpiresHint: Leave empty to create a token without expiration.
settings.apiTokenCreatedHint: Store this token securely. It cannot be shown again.
settings.apiTokenInvalidExpiration: Please enter a valid expiration date.

ics.title: ICS Subscriptions
ics.confirm_delete: Do you really want to delete this subscription? All associated events will also be deleted.

settings.memberContactBirthdayHint: This member is automatically synchronized with Contacts and Birthdays.
settings.memberBirthDateInvalid: Use a valid birthday date in the selected date format.
settings.backupDownloadHint: Create a consistent SQLite backup of all application data.
settings.backupRestoreHint: Restore replaces the current database. Download a fresh backup before continuing.
settings.backupDropzoneTitle: Drop a backup file here or click to select
settings.backupRestoreConfirm: Restoring this backup will replace the current database for everyone. Continue?
settings.backupCliHint: For operational restores, stop the app, mount the backup in a temporary container and replace the database file.
settings.backupCliBackupHint: You can also create a backup directly from Docker Compose:
settings.backupSchedulerHint: Scheduled backups are created automatically and old backups are rotated.
settings.caldavDescription: Connect multiple CalDAV accounts (iCloud, Nextcloud, Radicale, Baikal, etc.) and choose which calendars to sync.
settings.caldavEmptyState: No CalDAV accounts connected yet. Add your first account to get started.
settings.caldavUrlHint: The base URL of your CalDAV server
settings.caldavPasswordHint: For iCloud: Use app-specific password from appleid.apple.com
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Really delete CalDAV account? All synced calendars will be removed.
settings.cardavDescription: Connect multiple CardDAV accounts (iCloud, Nextcloud, Radicale, etc.) and sync your contacts.
settings.cardavEmptyState: No CardDAV accounts connected yet. Add your first account to sync contacts.
settings.cardavUrlHint: The base URL of your CardDAV server
settings.cardavPasswordHint: For iCloud: Use app-specific password from appleid.apple.com
settings.deleteCardDAVAccountConfirm: Really delete CardDAV account? All synced contacts will remain but lose their CardDAV link.
settings.housekeepingPaymentTasksLabel: Create a payment task on each housekeeper check-in
settings.housekeepingPaymentTasksHint: When enabled, each check-in creates a task for paying the staff member. Completing that task marks the visit payment as paid.
settings.helpTooltipCalDAV: CalDAV ermöglicht die Synchronisation von Kalendern mit iCloud, Nextcloud und anderen CalDAV-Servern.
settings.helpTooltipCardDAV: CardDAV ermöglicht die Synchronisation von Kontakten mit iCloud, Nextcloud und anderen CardDAV-Servern.

login.tagline: Family planning. Secure. Privacy-friendly. Open source.
login.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.

reminders.notificationHint: Receive notifications while the app is open.

birthdays.title: Birthdays
birthdays.upcomingHint: The next people to celebrate, already synced to the calendar.
birthdays.peopleHint: Search, review and edit every saved birthday.
birthdays.emptyDescription: Add a birthday to keep it visible in the calendar and reminders.
birthdays.photoOptional: Optional: you can save without a profile picture.
birthdays.notesPlaceholder: Gift ideas, favorite cake, family notes…
birthdays.calendarHint: Each birthday is automatically added to the calendar and reminder system.
birthdays.requiredFields: Name and birth date are required.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.emptyDescription: Save your favorite recipes and reuse them in meal planning.

onboarding.step1Body: Your personal family planner. Tasks, calendar, shopping and more – all in one place.
onboarding.step2Body: At the bottom you can directly access Dashboard and Calendar. The ··· button opens additional modules like Kitchen, Notes and Contacts.
onboarding.step3Body: Use the + FAB button to create new entries anywhere. Swipe list items left or right for quick actions.

emptyHint.tasks: Tap + to create your first task. Swipe a card left to delete.
emptyHint.calendar: Connect Google Calendar under Settings → Integrations for automatic sync.
emptyHint.shopping: Add items and swipe to check off or delete.
emptyHint.notes: Tap + for a new note. Notes are full-text searchable.
emptyHint.contacts: Add important contacts — doctor, school, emergency — for quick access.
emptyHint.budget: Create categories and track income and expenses.
emptyHint.meals: Plan meals for the week and link recipes.
emptyHint.birthdays: Add birthdays — you will receive a reminder in time.
emptyHint.recipes: Create recipes and link them to your meal planner.

documents.title: Documents
documents.emptyDescription: Upload family documents and control who can see each file.
documents.fileHint: PDF, images, text and Office files up to 5 MB.
documents.fileTooLarge: File may be at most 5 MB.
documents.dropzoneTitle: Drop file here or click to choose
documents.dropzoneHint: Drag a file into this area, or use the file picker.

housekeeping.title: Cleaner workspace
housekeeping.noWorkerHint: Create the worker profile to define contacts, rate, and payment schedule.
housekeeping.checkInDisabled: Add a housekeeper before checking in.
housekeeping.noVisitReports: No staff visits recorded this month.
housekeeping.staffLogHint: Edit visit dates, amounts, and linked records.
housekeeping.deleteVisitConfirm: Delete this visit? The linked calendar event and payment task will also be removed.
housekeeping.receiptUploadHint: Attach a payment receipt. It will appear in Documents.
housekeeping.receiptDocumentDescription: Payment receipt for {{name}} housekeeping visit on {{date}}.

splitExpenses.title: Shared expenses
splitExpenses.subtitle: Split household bills, trips, shopping, and family costs.
splitExpenses.emptyGroupsText: Create a household, trip, event, or shopping group to start splitting costs.
splitExpenses.name: Name
splitExpenses.guestSyncHint: This guest is added to Family Management, Contacts, and Birthdays when provided.

splitHint.percentage: Enter each selected member percentage. Total must be 100%.
splitHint.exact: Enter the exact amount for each selected member. Total must match the expense.
splitHint.shares: Enter whole-number shares for each selected member.

splitExpenses.deleteGroupConfirm: Delete this empty group? Groups with expenses must be archived.
